title: Over 70kg waste collected at beach clean-up
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two beach clean-ups were held, one in Dana Bay and another in Great Brak River on 27 December, and saw over 70kg of waste collected.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two beach clean-ups were held, one in Dana Bay and another in Great Brak River on 27 December, and saw over 70kg of waste collected."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Great Brak River Conservancy held its clean-up at Suiderkruis Beach with both the Minister of Forestry, Fisheries and the Environment, Willie Aucamp and Mossel Bay Municipality's Executive Mayor Alderman Dirk Kotzé, in attendance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Later in the afternoon, Aucamp and Kotzé attended the clean-up in Dana Bay, held by the Dana Bay Conservancy, accompanied by Ward 11 councillor Nickey Le Roux.","html":"Later in the afternoon, Aucamp and Kotzé attended the clean-up in Dana Bay, held by the Dana Bay Conservancy, accompanied by Ward 11 councillor Nickey Le Roux."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Conservancy's chairperson, Erika van der Westhuizen, said the clean-up was conducted between First Beach and the Blinde River and there were 46 volunteers present.","html":"The Conservancy's chairperson, Erika van der Westhuizen, said the clean-up was conducted between First Beach and the Blinde River and there were 46 volunteers present."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We were able to collect 75kg of waste between First Beach and the Blinde River. This is amazing considering that the beach actually seemed pretty clean,\" said Van der Westhuizen.","html":"\"We were able to collect 75kg of waste between First Beach and the Blinde River. This is amazing considering that the beach actually seemed pretty clean,\" said Van der Westhuizen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Volunteers at the Dana Bay beach clean-up. Photo: Supplied","html":"Volunteers at the Dana Bay beach clean-up. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After the Dana Bay clean-up, there was a fun tug-of-war competition, with six teams, made up of friends, family and local businesses competing.","html":"After the Dana Bay clean-up, there was a fun tug-of-war competition, with six teams, made up of friends, family and local businesses competing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van der Westhuizen thanked those who joined the and said the conservancy is planning another clean-up for the end of January.","html":"Van der Westhuizen thanked those who joined the and said the conservancy is planning another clean-up for the end of January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\" Please make sure to join us in making a difference. In the meantime, we encourage everyone to continue or start recycling more waste,\" she said.","html":"\" Please make sure to join us in making a difference. In the meantime, we encourage everyone to continue or start recycling more waste,\" she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
